placeholders.prompt: Primary email (the mailbox the Gmail MCP reads)
Other email accounts you send from that the Gmail MCP cannot read (comma-separated, or blank)
Absolute path where this vault lives
Your IANA timezone (used for scheduling/time blocks)
Short name for this vault (the Obsidian vault name; usually the folder name)
[pi pack] Google Drive Desktop mount dir name (or blank)
[pi pack] Google Drive folder ID for letters (or blank)
[pi pack] Drive ID of the letterhead .docx (or blank)
[pi pack] path to your lab-website content repo for cv-scan (or blank)
Local Quartz HTTP port (use a distinct port per instance so multiple vaults can run at once)
Claude Code project slug for this vault (the dir name under ~/.claude/projects/, i.e. the vault's absolute path with every non-alphanumeric character turned into -)
Your GitHub org/user for code repos (or blank)

note: literals[] are exact strings as they appear in the source vault, replaced by {{TOKEN}} at derive time. Detector false-positives that are NOT instance facts go in audit_allowlist.json. Bare institution words (Example U/exampleu) in prose are handled by template prose-rewrite (Task 5) + contract curation (Task 6), not blanket replacement. Completeness is enforced by auditing the derived template (packs/ + hardened/), not the full source vault — the source contains non-shipped instance DATA (contact emails, per-letter Drive IDs) that the engine never ships.
